failure_movement.justification: Prev iter7 clusters are null, so no prev->actual delta exists to confirm shrink/grow claims. Prediction anchors to iter_006 (~50 fail) not the recorded prev. Actual: empty11/unknown26/wrong10/correct53. 'Wrong flat or slight increase' is the only checkable claim and wrong=10 is plausibly low; unknown=26 still large. Vague, mostly unverifiable: partial credit.

trace_movement.justification: Two trace claims. Focal '** **' highlighting confirmed: 619/1505 hits contain ** markers. But 'spans show dual-query fusion in metadata' is NOT confirmed: search_mode only shows 'bm25+semantic', no rrf/dual/stopword fusion marker. Token-rise claim unverifiable (no prev baseline). ~one of two checkable claims confirmed.

side_effects.justification: Completion-stable and wrong-count-flat/slight-rise: wrong=10 is low, consistent, no regression evident. But no prev baseline confirms completion (205) or prompt (1588) stability. Negation-regression risk on stopword removal is plausible but unverifiable. Reasonable, hedged risk calls, no false alarm: partial credit.
